rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al

rulings.Case Title: VAN ECKHARDT, EDWIN C. ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE VS. WILLIAM VILLEDA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 30, 2015 line 13. PLAINTIFF VAN ECKHARDT and EDWIN C. ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Complete responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Requests for Production and Special Interrogatories shall be hand delivered to Plaintiff's counsel within 3 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,035. = (501/REQ)
